name: 写作连接句
description: 包含原因、转折、建议、可能性等写作常用表达。

items.english: Am I allowed to know the reason?
Should we add a little more salt?
I ran as fast as I could.
Could you spare me a few minutes?
items.chinese: 你能为我腾出几分钟时间吗?

items.english: Could you put it in plain language?
Could you pass me the mashed potato?
Could you pass me the salt, please?
items.chinese: 能不能请你把盐递给我？

items.english: Could you tell me your name again?
items.chinese: 请你再告诉我一遍你的名字?

items.english: I would do it if I could.
I'm sorry, could you say that again?
Could you give me your phone number?
items.chinese: 能给我你的电话号码吗?

items.english: Could you speak a little less loudly?
I ran as quickly as I could.
I wish I could go with you.
Could you pass me the mashed potatoes?
I wish I could talk to you.
How should we deal with this matter?
items.chinese: 我们应该怎么处理这个问题呢？

items.english: I might be able to fix that.
Could you give me a toothpick, please?
items.chinese: 请问你可以给我根牙签吗？

items.english: I should go ahead and do that.
You should go to see a doctor.
I was afraid I might be late.
I don't see any reason for it.
I wish I could give up smoking.
I might be a few minutes late.
You should be able to manage it.
You know that isn't possible, don't you?
items.chinese: 你应该知道那是不可能的吧。

items.english: I need it as quickly as possible.
We have no reason to be ashamed.
I'm glad I could be of service.
I told her what should be done.
items.chinese: 我告诉了她应该做什么。

items.english: I told him what the problem was.
I think you should make the deal.
We want to clear up this problem.
I wonder what I should do today.
items.chinese: 我在想我今天该干什么。

items.english: She might know that we are here.
items.chinese: 她或许知道我们在这儿。

items.english: My problem is I don't trust you.
items.chinese: 我的问题是我不信任你。

items.english: I need that as soon as possible.
items.chinese: 我尽可能快地需要那个。

items.english: We have no reason to feel ashamed.
I know how to solve the problem.
items.chinese: 我知道怎么解决这个问题。

items.english: I know this is important to you.
items.chinese: 我知道这对您来说很重要。

items.english: Because I want to be a translator.
You should pay the doctor a visit.
Could you give a simple self-introduction?
items.chinese: 你可以简单地做一下自我介绍吗？

items.english: Maybe you could draw me a picture.
I might stay for another few days.
We'll be there as soon as possible.
I think this coat should fit you.
items.chinese: 我认为这外套应该适合你。

items.english: We could go skating if you like.
items.chinese: 如果你要我们可以一起去滑冰。

items.english: I think we should lower the price.
items.chinese: 我觉得我们得调低价格。

items.english: I think you should get more rest.
items.chinese: 我觉得你应该多休息一会儿。

items.english: You should rest a little bit longer.
Should we use genetic engineering on people?
items.chinese: 我们应该对人使用基因编辑吗？

items.english: I wish that I could stop hiccuping.
Of course I should read this book.
items.chinese: 我本来应该读一下这本书。

items.english: He has no reason to be late.
You should pay your rent in advance.
I suggest you do that by yourselves.
I think we should reduce the price.
items.chinese: 我觉得我们得调低价格。

items.english: I could hear dogs barking all night.
And I thought you could smoke here.
items.chinese: 我还以为这里可以吸烟呢。

items.english: You should be good to your neighbors.
I think that fact is very important.
items.chinese: 我认为这个事实很重要。

items.english: I can't sleep because of the noise.
items.chinese: 因为太闹，所以我睡不着觉。

items.english: I asked because I thought you knew.
items.chinese: 我以为你知道所以我就问问。

items.english: He ran as fast as he could.
items.chinese: 他跑得能有多快就有多快。

items.english: You should have come a little earlier.
What should they do in this situation?
items.chinese: 在这种情况下，他们该做什么？

items.english: Although it is snowing, I must go.
items.chinese: 虽然正在下雪，但是我也非去不可。

items.english: The fact is, I think, very important.
items.chinese: 我认为这个事实很重要。

items.english: You should have shown him the device.
items.chinese: 你应该给他看看这装置。

items.english: We have an important exam next week.
items.chinese: 我们下周有一场重要的考试。

items.english: I understand how to solve the problem.
I don't think she should've done that.
Run like your life depends on it.
Perhaps we could get a drink sometime.
items.chinese: 要不我们找时间喝一顿。

items.english: You should give up smoking and drinking.
Get it done as soon as possible.
The problem is, he has no money.
I can't deal with this problem anymore.
It's possible that you don't know this.
You should have completed it long ago.
items.chinese: 你们很久前就应该完成了。

items.english: For me, that is not a problem.
He should have done it that way.
I am charged with an important mission.
items.chinese: 我身负一个重要的任务。

items.english: We ridiculed him because of that thing.
items.chinese: 我们因为那件事嘲笑他。

items.english: For me, this is not a problem.
items.chinese: 对我来说这就不是个问题。

items.english: You should not trifle with his feelings.
All things are possible if you believe.
items.chinese: 如果相信，一切皆有可能。

items.english: God knows we did everything we could.
items.chinese: 上帝知道我们做了我们所能做的事。
